name: claim_number_present
expression: claim_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(claim_number)) > 0
description: claim_number is required for Insurance Claim File extraction.

name: policy_number_present
expression: policy_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(policy_number)) > 0
description: policy_number is required for Insurance Claim File extraction.

name: loss_date_present
expression: loss_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(loss_date)) > 0
description: loss_date is required for Insurance Claim File extraction.

name: reserve_amount_non_negative
description: reserve_amount should be non-negative when present.

name: paid_amount_non_negative
description: paid_amount should be non-negative when present.
